name: agentpack
description: Thin Codex plugin for AgentPack ranked repo context.

interface.shortDescription: Start Codex with ranked repo context.
interface.longDescription: AgentPack is a local context engine, not a coding agent. This plugin gives Codex lightweight commands for routing tasks, refreshing context packs, and reviewing diffs with the existing local AgentPack CLI or MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Use $agentpack-review to review the current PR.
Use $agentpack-resolve to address all PR comments.
Use $agentpack to orient this repository task.
